sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Ship Speed Modulation
special_mechanics.description: Players collect 'S' icons that increase the overall speed of the biplane craft

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Biplane equipped with standard shot (travels max distance of half screen height) and bombs for area damage. Three weapon types available via pickups: wide shot, laser beam, flamethrower

special_mechanics.name: Firepower Progression
special_mechanics.description: Collecting three 'P' icons increases firepower by one level, with third power level being maximum. Further P icons grant points instead

tier_notes: T2 - Empirical/Qualitative data. Fire Shark is a shoot-em-up (shmup), not a platformer. Player character is a biplane with no jumping or gravity mechanics. Physics parameters for typical platformer mechanics (walk speed, gravity, jump velocity) are not applicable. No detailed movement physics documentation available in provided sources.
